mapper.select: SELECT student_id FROM student WHERE user_id = #{userId}

SELECT e.enrollment_id FROM enrollment e JOIN course_section cs ON cs.section_id = e.section_id JOIN semester sm ON sm.semester_id = cs.semester_id JOIN course c ON c.course_id = cs.course_id WHERE e.student_id = #{studentId} AND e.status = 'ENROLLED' AND sm.is_current = 1 AND c.course_code = #{courseId} FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY

SELECT c.course_code AS course_id, c.course_name, p.name AS professor, CASE WHEN r.review_id IS NULL THEN 'PENDING' ELSE 'SUBMITTED' END AS status, r.rating_overall, TO_CHAR(r.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS created_at FROM student s JOIN enrollment e ON e.student_id = s.student_id AND e.status = 'ENROLLED' JOIN course_section cs ON cs.section_id = e.section_id JOIN semester sm ON sm.semester_id = cs.semester_id JOIN course c ON c.course_id = cs.course_id JOIN professor p ON p.professor_id = cs.professor_id LEFT JOIN review r ON r.enrollment_id = e.enrollment_id WHERE s.user_id = #{userId} AND sm.is_current = 1 ORDER BY c.course_name, cs.section_no
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO review ( enrollment_id, rating_overall, rating_content, rating_workload, rating_professor, difficulty, pros, cons, advice, is_anonymous, created_at ) VALUES ( #{enrollmentId}, #{request.ratingOverall}, #{request.ratingContent}, #{request.ratingWorkload}, #{request.ratingProfessor}, #{request.difficulty}, #{request.pros}, #{request.cons}, #{request.advice}, CASE WHEN #{request.anonymous} = 0 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, SYSTIMESTAMP )
mapper.select: SELECT review_id FROM review WHERE enrollment_id = #{enrollmentId} ORDER BY created_at DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY
